app.title: BeatStride
welcome.title: BeatStride へようこそ
welcome.subtitle: ランニング用プレイリストを読み込み、拍位置を調整して書き出します
library.title: トラック
library.empty: ここにドラッグするか、インポートをクリック
timeline.title: タイムライン
timeline.metronomeTrack: メトロノームトラック
alignment.title: 拍合わせ
alignment.metronomeOffset: メトロノームオフセット(ms)
inspector.title: インスペクタ
settings.title: 設定
settings.sectionTraining: トレーニングと書き出し
settings.sectionTrainingHint: 既定のトレーニング設定と書き出し動作
settings.sectionFfmpegHint: 状態、自動検出、パス修正
settings.sectionGeneralDescription: アプリの言語と表示テーマを管理します。system モードもここに残します。
settings.sectionTrainingDescription: 既定の出力先、目標 BPM、メトロノーム音色、フェード値をまとめて管理します。
settings.sectionFfmpegDescription: FFmpeg の状態確認、自動検出、手動でのバイナリパス修正を行います。
settings.sectionAdvancedDescription: 開発者モードとデバッグ時のみ必要な機能を制御します。
settings.normalizeHint: 有効にすると、新規プロジェクトは書き出し時にラウドネス正規化を既定で試みます。
export.title: 書き出し
status.dragDropHint: ファイルをウィンドウにドラッグ可能
brand.tagline: Keep stride BPM, downbeat alignment, and export timing on the same line.
welcome.noRecentProjects: No recent projects yet. Start a new training session.
alignment.resultHint: Auto analysis updates BPM, meter, and downbeat offset. If tiny errors remain, fine-tune the two offsets above.
inspector.summaryEmpty: Select a workspace track to see the actual mapping result here.
inspector.summaryNote: Meter and accents are stored per track; the lower area keeps only the essential downbeat and metronome offset adjustments.
inspector.beatGainHelp: Controls the overall metronome level layered over the track. Default is 0 dB and can be fine-tuned between -10 dB and 10 dB.
inspector.transitionBarsHelp: How many bars each medley crossfade should last. This mainly affects medley export, not single-track export.
inspector.transitionDuckHelp: Lower both sides during crossfade to avoid stacked peaks and muddy transitions.
inspector.headroomHelp: Reserve final output headroom to prevent clipping after loudness processing and metronome layering.
inspector.enableLoudnormHelp: Normalizes loudness during export. Useful for medleys, but adds processing time.
inspector.targetLufsHelp: Overall loudness target. Values closer to 0 are louder.
inspector.targetLraHelp: Allowed dynamic range. Higher values keep more movement in the track.
inspector.targetTpHelp: True peak ceiling for the final output. -1 dBTP is a common safe value.
settings.developerModeHint: Allow F12 / Ctrl+Shift+I and auto-open browser devtools when enabled.
settings.ffmpegNoPath: 利用可能なパスはまだ見つかっていません
settings.ffmpegMessage.detected_saved_pa: 現在保存されている ffmpeg / ffprobe パスを使用しています。
settings.ffmpegMessage.detected_resource: アプリのリソースから利用可能な ffmpeg / ffprobe を検出しました。
settings.ffmpegMessage.detected_common_d: 一般的なインストール先から利用可能な ffmpeg / ffprobe を検出しました。
settings.ffmpegMessage.detected_path_env: システム PATH から利用可能な ffmpeg / ffprobe を検出しました。
settings.ffmpegMessage.ffmpeg_or_ffprobe: 利用可能な ffmpeg と ffprobe の組み合わせが見つかりません。インストールを確認するか手動でパスを設定してください。
export.outputDirPlaceholder: Falls back to the system default directory when the project is not saved yet.
export.singleBlocked: Select one workspace track before running single-track export.
preview.queueEmptyHint: Add checked tracks from the left list to build your medley and preview order.
preview.visualTitleEmpty: Pick a track from the workspace first
preview.visualSubtitleEmpty: Once a track is selected, you can inspect how the downbeat and metronome line up instead of relying on numbers alone.
preview.visualSubtitleMedleyEmpty: Select a track in the workspace to show the simplified waveform, downbeat line, and metronome hits here.
preview.visualSubtitleMedleySelected: This view stays on the selected track timeline even while medley preview is playing.
preview.visualSubtitleOriginal: Check whether strong transients sit close to the beat lines; hold Ctrl + wheel to zoom into details.
preview.visualSubtitleProxyReady: Orange marks the music downbeat, cyan marks the metronome start. Check whether the main peaks consistently lock to the beat lines.
preview.visualSubtitleProxyMissing: Use the real waveform to verify peak alignment first, then generate proxies or continue medley preview.
preview.visualHint: Hold Ctrl + wheel to zoom and scroll horizontally for detail. Watch whether transient peaks stay close to the beat lines.
preview.visualEmptyTitle: Select a track to reveal the beat alignment view
preview.visualEmptyBody: You can check whether the downbeat and metronome lines match before fine-tuning offsets in the inspector.
app.proxyTooltipIdle: Generate reusable proxies for checked tracks
app.proxyStoppingHint: Stop requested. The current track will finish before the task ends.
app.proxyStopHint: Click again to stop proxy generation.
app.proxyApiMissing: The proxy generation API is not available in the current process. Fully restart the app and try again.
app.proxySaveRequired: Save the project before generating proxies.
